message:
🐛 Fix cache race conditions during mode transitions (#773)

Four intertwined race conditions caused cards to show empty states
("No workloads found") instead of loading skeletons when switching
from demo to live mode:

1. fetch() catch block always set isLoading: false - now keeps loading
   state when no cached data and retries remaining (< MAX_FAILURES)
2. useEffect called refetch() immediately on mode switch, racing with
   the 500ms skeleton timer - now detects mode transitions and defers
   to triggerAllRefetches()
3. storageLoadPromise was nullified carelessly after await - now only
   clears if not replaced by concurrent resetToInitialData()
4. No stale fetch protection - added resetVersion counter so in-flight
   fetches are discarded when a mode transition resets the store

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
